mapper.sql: id, course_code, course_name, course_type, coach_id, coach_name, max_students, current_students, course_price, course_duration, total_lessons, per_lesson_hours, late_policy, course_date, start_time, end_time, venue_id, venue_name, description, image_url, status, is_hot, difficulty, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_course WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE course_code = #{courseCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_course (course_code, course_name, course_type, coach_id, coach_name, max_students, current_students, course_price, course_duration, total_lessons, per_lesson_hours, late_policy, course_date, start_time, end_time, venue_id, venue_name, description, image_url, status, is_hot, difficulty) VALUES (#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{coachId}, #{coachName}, #{maxStudents}, #{currentStudents}, #{coursePrice}, #{courseDuration}, #{totalLessons}, #{perLessonHours}, #{latePolicy}, #{courseDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{venueId}, #{venueName}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{isHot}, #{difficulty})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_course
course_code = #{courseCode}, course_name = #{courseName}, course_type = #{courseType}, coach_id = #{coachId}, coach_name = #{coachName}, max_students = #{maxStudents}, current_students = #{currentStudents}, course_price = #{coursePrice}, course_duration = #{courseDuration}, total_lessons = #{totalLessons}, per_lesson_hours = #{perLessonHours}, late_policy = #{latePolicy}, course_date = #{courseDate}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, venue_id = #{venueId}, venue_name = #{venueName}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, status = #{status}, is_hot = #{isHot}, difficulty = #{difficulty},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_course SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_course WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_date DESC, start_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE course_type = #{courseType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_date DESC
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_date DESC
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE status = 1 AND current_students < max_students AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_date ASC
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE is_hot = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY current_students DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM t_course WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_course WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_course SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_course SET current_students = #{count} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_course SET current_students = current_students + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_course SET current_students = current_students - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 AND current_students > 0
